B 89

DELTA AIRLINES SKY CLUB

This grade is calculated by us from Florida DBPR public inspection records — Florida does not issue official grades. How we calculate it →

Data last updated: May 6, 2026

B · 89/100 · safer than 40% of Orange County restaurants we grade

DELTA AIRLINES SKY CLUB is a fair-to-middling result — a B, 89/100, at its latest inspection on May 6, 2026.

Inspectors cited 1 high-priority and 3 basic violations. That puts it safer than 40% of Orange County restaurants we grade. Diner rating: 4.3 from 2,017 reviews.

Get directions Call (800) 221-1212

Inspection history

The following records are from Florida DBPR public inspection records, most recent first.

  1. May 6, 2026 · Routine - Food

    Inspection Completed - No Further Action

    1 high-priority · 0 intermediate · 3 basic

    • 12 — Handwashing; employee eating/drinking/smoking practices
    • 24 — Storage & handling of clean equipment and utensils; air drying
    • 29 — Plumbing installed & maintained; mop sink; backflow prevention
    • 36 — Floors, walls, ceilings clean & maintained; proper ventilation
